findings.detail: moDC3 is at the convergence of the LC, myeloid DC, and mo-DC PAGA branches. It expresses transcripts associated with DC maturation (CD83, CCR7, LAMP3, CD40, CD86), immunoregulation (CD274, IDO1, CD200, PDCD1LG2, SOCS1) and migration (FSCN1, PLGRKT, TRAF1, BCL2A1, CFLAR and REL)
Acquisition of this common gene signature is associated with loss of genes conferring subset identity, observed in moDC3, LC4 and Mig. DC
The migratory DC signature in moDC3 is conserved in migratory murine dermal DC2 and splenic DC1
